panels.description: Number of distinct switch samplers that observed TX or RX traffic for the selected workload.

targets.rawSql:
WITH splitByChar('/', '${workload}') AS w
SELECT countDistinct(sampler_address) AS switches
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND (
       (src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3])
    OR (dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3])
  )

panels.title: Switch Count Observing Workload Traffic

panels.description: Number of distinct Pods that sent or received traffic for the selected workload.

targets.rawSql:
WITH splitByChar('/', '${workload}') AS w
SELECT countDistinct(pod) AS pods
FROM
(
    SELECT src_k8s_pod_name AS pod
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
      AND src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
      AND src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
      AND src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
      AND src_k8s_pod_name != ''

    UNION DISTINCT

    SELECT dst_k8s_pod_name AS pod
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
      AND dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
      AND dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
      AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
      AND dst_k8s_pod_name != ''
)

panels.title: Workload Pod Count

panels.description: Outbound traffic rate from the selected workload, grouped by observing switch. Legend format: Switch <IP> TX rate.

targets.rawSql:
WITH splitByChar('/', '${workload}') AS w
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(time_flow_start) AS time,
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) AS switch,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS tx_rate
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
  AND src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
  AND src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
GROUP BY time, switch
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Workload TX Rate by Switch

panels.description: Inbound traffic rate to the selected workload, grouped by observing switch. Legend format: Switch <IP> RX rate.

targets.rawSql:
WITH splitByChar('/', '${workload}') AS w
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(time_flow_start) AS time,
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) AS switch,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS rx_rate
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
  AND dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
  AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
GROUP BY time, switch
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Workload RX Rate by Switch

panels.description: Outbound traffic rate from the selected workload, limited to the top 10 source Pods by total TX bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH splitByChar('/', '${workload}') AS w
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    concat(f.src_k8s_pod_namespace, '/', f.src_k8s_pod_name) AS pod,
    f.src_k8s_node_name AS node,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS tx_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
  AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
  AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
  AND f.src_k8s_pod_name != ''
  AND (f.src_k8s_pod_namespace, f.src_k8s_pod_name, f.src_k8s_node_name) IN
  (
      SELECT
          src_k8s_pod_namespace,
          src_k8s_pod_name,
          src_k8s_node_name
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
        AND src_k8s_pod_name != ''
      GROUP BY src_k8s_pod_namespace, src_k8s_pod_name, src_k8s_node_name
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, pod, node
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Workload Pods Sending Traffic Rate

panels.description: Inbound traffic rate to the selected workload, limited to the top 10 destination Pods by total RX bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH splitByChar('/', '${workload}') AS w
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    concat(f.dst_k8s_pod_namespace, '/', f.dst_k8s_pod_name) AS pod,
    f.dst_k8s_node_name AS node,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS rx_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
  AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
  AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
  AND f.dst_k8s_pod_name != ''
  AND (f.dst_k8s_pod_namespace, f.dst_k8s_pod_name, f.dst_k8s_node_name) IN
  (
      SELECT
          dst_k8s_pod_namespace,
          dst_k8s_pod_name,
          dst_k8s_node_name
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
        AND dst_k8s_pod_name != ''
      GROUP BY dst_k8s_pod_namespace, dst_k8s_pod_name, dst_k8s_node_name
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, pod, node
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Workload Pods Receiving Traffic Rate

panels.description: Selected workload is the source side. Shows traffic rate sent to other workloads over time, limited to the top 10 destination workloads by total TX bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH splitByChar('/', '${workload}') AS w
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    concat(f.dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', f.dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name) AS peer_workload,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS tx_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
  AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
  AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
  AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
  AND NOT (
      f.dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
      AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
      AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
  )
  AND (f.dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, f.dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name) IN
  (
      SELECT
          dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace,
          dst_k8s_top_owner_kind,
          dst_k8s_top_owner_name
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
        AND NOT (
            dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
            AND dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
            AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
        )
      GROUP BY dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, dst_k8s_top_owner_name
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, peer_workload
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Traffic Rate Sent to Other Workloads

panels.description: Selected workload is the destination side. Shows traffic rate received from other workloads over time, limited to the top 10 source workloads by total RX bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH splitByChar('/', '${workload}') AS w
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    concat(f.src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', f.src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', f.src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS peer_workload,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS rx_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
  AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
  AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
  AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
  AND NOT (
      f.src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
      AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
      AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
  )
  AND (f.src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, f.src_k8s_top_owner_kind, f.src_k8s_top_owner_name) IN
  (
      SELECT
          src_k8s_top_owner_namespace,
          src_k8s_top_owner_kind,
          src_k8s_top_owner_name
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
        AND NOT (
            src_k8s_top_owner_namespace = w[1]
            AND src_k8s_top_owner_kind = w[2]
            AND src_k8s_top_owner_name = w[3]
        )
      GROUP BY src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, src_k8s_top_owner_kind, src_k8s_top_owner_name
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, peer_workload
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Traffic Rate Received from Other Workloads

list.description: ClickHouse datasource used by the sFlow dashboards.
list.label: ClickHouse
list.name: clickhouse

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT workload
FROM
(
    SELECT concat(src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
      AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''

    UNION DISTINCT

    SELECT concat(dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
      AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
)
ORDER BY workload
list.description: Kubernetes top owner workload, formatted as namespace/kind/name.
list.label: Workload
list.name: workload

query.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT workload
FROM
(
    SELECT concat(src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
      AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''

    UNION DISTINCT

    SELECT concat(dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
      AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
)
ORDER BY workload
